item.title: 更少的专家，更快的解码：混合专家的成本感知推测解码
item.summary: arXiv:2607.12696v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models have become an important approach for scaling Large Language Models (LLMs), but their inference efficiency depends strongly on expert activation patterns.
